gogita-baramidze.name: Gogita Baramidze
gogita-baramidze.title: Audit Group Manager & Certified Accountant
gogita-baramidze.summary: Accomplished Certified Accountant and Audit Manager with a Master's Degree in Finance and extensive experience in financial consulting. Expert in planning audit processes, analyzing financial statements according to IFRS/GAAP standards, and ensuring tax compliance. Specialized in project management and providing strategic financial advice to SMEs using professional software like ORIS and FINA.

tamar-mzhavanadze.name: Tamar Mzhavanadze
tamar-mzhavanadze.title: Accountant
tamar-mzhavanadze.summary: Highly experienced financial professional with a Bachelor's Degree in Finance and Banking and over 15 years of practice in accounting and financial management. Proven track record as a Head Accountant across construction and corporate sectors, with expertise in tax legislation, reporting, and software proficiency in ORIS 5 and FMG. Certified by the Federation of Professional Accountants and Auditors of Georgia (GFPAA).

tamta-ustalishvili.name: Tamta Ustalishvili
tamta-ustalishvili.title: Accountant
tamta-ustalishvili.summary: Diligent financial professional with a Bachelor's Degree in Finance, Banking, and Insurance and over a decade of experience in accounting and administrative roles. Currently serving as an Accountant at Prestige Audit LLC, with previous expertise as a Chief Accountant Assistant in the automotive sector. Skilled in financial reporting, Oris 5 software, and office management operations.

tornike-sergeevi.name: Tornike Sergeevi
tornike-sergeevi.title: Data Analyst
tornike-sergeevi.summary: Results-driven Data Analyst with an MBA and over 10 years of experience in data visualization, reporting, and automation using MS Excel, VBA, SQL, and Power BI. Proven expertise in building data pipelines, analyzing financial statements, and managing AML compliance procedures. Currently applying advanced data science techniques to support business decision-making at Prestige Audit LTD.

lali-chigogidze.name: Lali Chigogidze
lali-chigogidze.title: Audit Group Manager & Head Accountant
lali-chigogidze.summary: Distinguished financial expert with a Master's Degree and over 15 years of experience in auditing, accounting, and financial consulting. Certified Public Sector Auditor and Chief Accountant (GFPAA) with a strong foundation in IFRS for SMEs and tax legislation. Currently serving as an Audit Group Manager at Prestige Audit LLC, specializing in developing accounting policies, financial modeling, and managing complex audits for public and private sector entities.

maia-pheikrishvili.name: Maia Pheikrishvili
maia-pheikrishvili.title: Director & Auditor
maia-pheikrishvili.summary: Distinguished auditor and financial expert with a Candidate of Economic Sciences degree and over 25 years of leadership experience in auditing and academia. Serving as the Director of Prestige-Audit LLC and the Adjara Branch of the Federation of Professional Accountants and Auditors of Georgia (GFPAA). Certified in IFRS for SMEs and ISO Management Quality Control, with extensive experience as a mentor and trainer for international development projects (SDC, UNDP).

marine-lominadze.name: Marine Lominadze
marine-lominadze.title: Audit Assistant
marine-lominadze.summary: Detail-oriented financial professional with extensive experience in the banking and auditing sectors. Currently serving as an Audit Assistant at Prestige Audit LLC, with a strong background in credit administration, loan documentation, and corporate client relations gained at ProCredit Bank and Halyk Bank. Proficient in financial software including ORIS and FINA, with expertise in data verification and internal control assessments.

mzia-gegechkori.name: Mzia Gegechkori
mzia-gegechkori.title: Auditor & Accountant
mzia-gegechkori.summary: Professional Accountant with over 20 years of experience in financial management and auditing. Certified by the Georgian Federation of Professional Accountants and Auditors (GFPAA). Currently serving as an Auditor at Prestige Audit LTD and Accountant at Dekori LTD, with strong expertise in tax accounting and financial reporting using ORIS 5 software.

mzia-melikishvili.name: Mzia Melikishvili
mzia-melikishvili.title: Assistant Auditor & Accountant
mzia-melikishvili.summary: Certified Accountant (GFPAA) with a Master's Degree in Computer Modeling of Business Processes and over a decade of experience in financial management. Currently serving as an Assistant Auditor at Prestige-Audit LTD and Accountant at Lana LTD. Skilled in IFRS standards, tax legislation, and data analysis, with proficiency in ORIS 5 and ORIS 7 accounting software.
certifications: Master's in Computer Modeling of Business Processes

natia-khajishvili.name: Natia Khajishvili
natia-khajishvili.title: Audit Assistant & Accountant
natia-khajishvili.summary: Dedicated financial professional with a degree from Shota Rustaveli State University of Batumi and over 10 years of experience in accounting and auditing. Currently serving as an Audit Assistant at Prestige-Audit LLC, with extensive prior experience as an accountant for multiple organizations including LLC Belvoir. Certified in financial statement preparation by the Accounting, Reporting, and Audit Supervision Service, with strong proficiency in ORIS 5 and MS Office.
certifications: Financial Statement Preparation — Audit Supervision Service

nato-romanadze.name: Nato Romanadze
nato-romanadze.title: Auditor & Chief Accountant
nato-romanadze.summary: Highly experienced Auditor and Chief Accountant with over 20 years of practice in financial management and auditing. Currently serving as an Auditor and Engagement Partner at Prestige-Audit LTD, with a proven track record as a Chief Accountant for multiple large enterprises. Holds a Professional Accountant qualification (GFPAA) and has been a certified General Auditor since 2012, recognized for professional excellence by the Georgian Federation of Professional Accountants and Auditors.

nato-jabnidze.name: Nato Jabnidze
nato-jabnidze.title: Accounting Consultant & Chief Accountant
nato-jabnidze.summary: Distinguished financial expert and academic holding a Candidate of Economic Sciences degree with over 20 years of experience. Currently serves as an Accounting Consultant at Prestige Audit LLC and Chief Accountant at LLC Iberia J, alongside an academic career as an Assistant Professor and Deputy Dean at Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University. Certified in IFRS for SMEs and taxation, with deep expertise in financial analysis and accounting policy development.

nutsa-jincharadze.name: Nutsa Jincharadze
nutsa-jincharadze.title: Assistant Accountant
nutsa-jincharadze.summary: Motivated finance student currently pursuing a Bachelor's Degree in Finance at Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University. Gaining practical experience as an Assistant Accountant at Prestige-Audit LTD since 2024. Certified in Financial Reporting and ORIS accounting software by 'Pheikrishvili & Company' LTD, with proficiency in multilingual communication and Microsoft Office tools.

romili-beridze.name: Romili Beridze
romili-beridze.title: Auditor, Group Manager & Financial Manager
romili-beridze.summary: Accomplished financial professional with extensive experience in auditing and financial management. Currently serves as an Auditor and Group Manager at Prestige-Audit L.T.D. and as Financial Manager at Chateau Iveri Ltd. Holds a Bachelor of Economics degree and has completed significant ACCA program papers (F1–F8, P2, P7, SBL). Offers international perspective from studies in Norway and a strong background in business administration.
certifications: ACCA Papers F1–F8, P2, P7, SBL

rusudan-baramidze.name: Rusudan Baramidze
rusudan-baramidze.title: Audit Assistant & Accountant
rusudan-baramidze.summary: Ambitious financial professional with a Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration and a Master's in Computer Science. Currently serving as an Audit Assistant at Prestige-Audit LTD and as an Accountant at QSCert Georgia. Certified in ORIS 7 accounting software and financial reporting, with a diverse technical skillset including VBA, SQL, and web technologies.

rusudan-gugeshashvili.name: Rusudan Gugeshashvili
rusudan-gugeshashvili.title: Audit Assistant
rusudan-gugeshashvili.summary: Financial professional with over 15 years of experience in accounting, auditing, and financial training. Currently serving as an Audit Assistant at Prestige Audit LTD, with a diverse background that includes roles as an Accountant for multiple organizations (Symbiozi LTD, Al-Me LTD) and as a Financial/Tax Accounting Trainer for Promolex Georgia LTD. Certified by the Georgian Federation of Professional Accountants and Auditors (GFPAA) and proficient in ORIS accounting software.

giorgi-seperteladze.name: Giorgi Seperteladze
giorgi-seperteladze.title: Audit Assistant & Accountant
giorgi-seperteladze.summary: Dedicated and detail-oriented financial specialist with a Bachelor's Degree in Economics and over 3 years of experience in accounting and auditing. Proven expertise in financial documentation, tax liabilities, and audit procedures using FINA and ORIS software. Committed to accuracy and supporting business efficiency through rigorous financial analysis.
